text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thank goodness it's nothingmore than a scratch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm sorry, I can't just sit quietly<n>until I'm
fully healed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I've got invitations fromtons of people to go runningtomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then I have a concert this<n>weekend! I couldn't
possibly be<n>responsible for an empty seat in the
audience!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's too much I wanna do to let<n>this light
injury hold me down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm totally fine! I can<n>totally move!
Come on, let's get back<n>to training!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: H-hey, come on! I said I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's training and simping to be<n>done! I've got
no time to rest!
choice_data_list: True, but you need your health for both!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... I can't really argue with that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You're right... it's hard to have fun ifI'm not healthy... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital and I share<n>some quiet
time while I try to cheer<n>her up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yay! That's my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now, just you watch! ♪ An injury like<n>this is
nothing in the face of my love<n>for Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Aaarrrgh! It's no good!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, and right after all my boasting... I<n>guess I
played myself...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's no fair... My plans with all the<n>Umas... My
concert... I wanna<n>GOOO—ugh! Ouchie!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital tries to push herself too<n>hard and
ends up making her injury<n>worse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Trainer? I can<n>move around
just fine, right?!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I guess you look okay.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! All right! After training, I'm off<n>to my
concert, just as planned!<n>Nothing can stand in my
way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital successfully<n>resumes
training.
